description: Only CVEs with explicit primary-source evidence that an LLM participated in discovery are verified. Absence from this registry is not evidence that no LLM was involved.

headlineMinimum.basis: A first-party documented lower bound, not a corpus-wide count. Anthropic's machine-readable disclosure payload reports 28 CVE identifiers assigned to Claude Mythos Preview findings.

programReports.exclusionReason: Programme counts are not summed because public aggregates do not provide a cross-programme deduplication key.
